description_long: This is a sealed, rectangular plastic bag of Faragello Half Fried Falafel, featuring a vibrant and appetizing design. The front displays the Faragello logo in red and white, with an image of falafel balls on a bed of greens, surrounded by illustrations of fresh herbs and vegetables. The back of the package contains detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and multilingual product descriptions. The sides of the bag are narrow and show partial graphics and text, emphasizing the bag's slim profile. The packaging is predominantly white with green and red accents, giving it a fresh and healthy appearance. The bag appears to be filled with air to cushion the contents, typical for snack packaging.
description: A white, rectangular plastic bag of Faragello Half Fried Falafel with colorful food imagery and detailed nutritional labeling. The packaging is vibrant, featuring red, green, and white colors with clear branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Faragello logo, product name, and a vivid image of falafel balls with herbs and vegetables.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the slim profile of the bag, with partial graphics and some green and yellow illustrations.
description_view_2: The back view displays nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual product information, along with a smaller Faragello logo.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the narrow edge of the bag with partial text and illustrations, including a visible onion graphic.
attribute_brand_logo: The Faragello brand logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a stylized red 'F' above the word 'Faragello' in white text on a red background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package shows images of falafel and herbs, and the text 'Half Fried Falafel' clearly indicates the flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories and other nutritional information.
